description: Systematically evaluate and deploy all dev-sandbox projects to appropriate locations per SOP 3 (Skills) and SOP 31 (AI Assistants)

context.background: The dev-sandbox contains 20+ projects at various stages of completion. Need to evaluate each and deploy to the correct location based on the new architecture.
goals: Create development tasks for incomplete projects
constraints: Follow SOP 31 for AI Assistants (standalone tools)
Follow SOP 3 for Skills (dev-sandbox Claude tools)

stories.title: Deploy website-builder as AI Assistant
acceptance_criteria: Copy src/ and templates to new location

stories.title: Evaluate and deploy personal-assistant
stories.description: Check if personal-assistant is ready for AI Assistant deployment
acceptance_criteria: Deploy as AI Assistant if ready

stories.title: Add VERSION to social-media-automation
stories.description: The social-media-automation project is missing a VERSION file
acceptance_criteria: Add VERSION file with appropriate version

stories.title: Evaluate MCP projects for publishing
stories.description: Check apollo-mcp, canva-mcp, upwork-mcp, ticket-aggregator-mcp status
acceptance_criteria: Check each for pyproject.toml and server.json
Identify which are ready for PyPI

stories.title: Clean up project duplicates
acceptance_criteria: Remove duplicates, keep most complete version

stories.title: Evaluate creator tools bundle
acceptance_criteria: Determine if they should be separate or bundled

stories.title: Archive deprecated projects
acceptance_criteria: Identify projects that have been replaced
Clean up ~/archived/ of very old items

success_metrics: All ready projects deployed to correct locations
No projects left in ambiguous state
Incomplete projects have clear development tasks
